author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of The Past and Future of the Order Part 2 - Order Weekend 1985
content:
SANGHARAKSHITA IN SEMINAR
ORDER QUESTIONS AND ANSWERS JUNE 1985
THE PAST AND THE FUTURE OF THE ORDER - PART 2
CONTENTS



1-4 New guidelines for Kalyana Mitras
Firstly, as regards the mitras
2 And as regards the Order Members - Regular atten dance at Chapter meetings and Order
weekends Good communication with other Order members
3 Not being in debt, including Order fees
4 England as the best place for Bhante to have dev eloped the Order
5 The advantage of knowing foreign languages Nationalism and patriotism
6 Practical difficulties of taking the FWBO to cer tain countries
Avoiding Schism
Overidentification with a particular FWBO centre/co mmunity
7 Avoiding 'monk' and 'lay' polarisation in the FW BO
How far into the future has Bhante planned?
8 The best use of the Movement's resources in term s of expansion
9 Setting up teams to start new Centres
10 Does the FWBO reflect an essentially English
approach?
The Chairman of an FWBO Centre- Bhante's vision
12 Bhante's thinking about violence and football h ooliganism
13 The desirability of all Order members going to India for six months
14 The future of the FWBO Newsletter and its use to educate
15 'Recognition' of the FWBO by the 'Buddhist Worl d'?
Spreading the Dharma more widely
16 Is size (of a movement's institutions) inherent ly inimical to spiritual vision?
17 Comparing urban and rural spiritual settings
18 Mindfulness in everyday life and its consequenc es
19 Regularity of meditation practice Advice for keeping meditation diaries.
